# Type A Reference Layout — Bento 3 Right Split

Reference example for the first programmable Type A separator layout.

## Box

- External dimensions: 150 x 200 x 100 mm
- Material thickness: 3 mm
- Kerf: 0.1 mm

## Internal layout

- One traversing primary vertical separator
- One partial secondary horizontal separator on the right zone
- Result: one large compartment on the left, two stacked compartments on the right

## Generated files

- box50-150x200x100-typeA-bento-3-right-split-layout.svg
- box50-150x200x100-typeA-bento-3-right-split-cut.svg

## Source layout

- generator/layouts/bento-3-right-split-150x200x100.json
